summary: Completed testing for LogiRent profile identity fields. All backend APIs pass (10/10 tests). Frontend profile page shows 'Informations d'identité' section with all fields. Admin Edit Client Modal shows 'Date de naissance' (not 'Année de naissance') and all identity fields.

issues: Route './agency-app/components/*.tsx' missing default export warnings - non-breaking expo-router issue
shadow* style props deprecated warning - use boxShadow instead

critical_code_review_comments: Backend: UserUpdate model correctly includes all identity fields (date_of_birth, birth_place, license_number, license_issue_date, license_expiry_date, nationality)
Backend: AdminUserUpdate model correctly includes all identity fields
Backend: QuickClientCreate model uses date_of_birth (not birth_year)
Frontend: profile.tsx correctly displays 'Informations d'identité' section with all 6 fields in read mode
Frontend: profile.tsx edit mode shows 'Identité & Permis' section with all editable fields including date format hint (JJ-MM-AAAA)
Frontend: EditClientModal.tsx shows 'Date de naissance' field (not 'Année de naissance') with all identity fields
Frontend: NewClientModal.tsx sends date_of_birth (not birth_year) to backend API
Frontend: authStore.ts User interface includes all identity fields (birth_place, date_of_birth, license_number, license_issue_date, license_expiry_date, nationality)
seed_data_creation: Test clients created via POST /api/admin/quick-client with identity fields
context_for_next_testing_agent: All identity fields verified working. Backend APIs (PUT /api/auth/profile, PUT /api/admin/users/{user_id}, POST /api/admin/quick-client) correctly handle date_of_birth (not birth_year). Frontend profile page shows identity section in both read and edit modes. Admin client modals use 'Date de naissance' instead of 'Année de naissance'.

backend_apis.PUT /api/auth/profile: PASS - Accepts and persists all identity fields
backend_apis.PUT /api/admin/users/{user_id}: PASS - Admin can update user identity fields
backend_apis.POST /api/admin/quick-client: PASS - Creates client with date_of_birth (not birth_year)

frontend_client_profile.read_mode_identity_section: PASS - Shows 'Informations d'identité' with all 6 fields
frontend_client_profile.edit_mode_identity_section: PASS - Shows 'Identité & Permis' with editable fields

frontend_admin_modals.edit_client_modal: PASS - Shows 'Date de naissance' (not 'Année de naissance')
frontend_admin_modals.new_client_modal: PASS (code verified) - Sends date_of_birth to API

field_migration.birth_year_to_date_of_birth: PASS - All references use date_of_birth format
